_meta.description: Values transcribed by hand from official company investor decks (PDF), each with page-level provenance. Wired per Neha's 2026-06-08 decision to use deck figures for the IFRS cells; this OVERRIDES the pipeline's default 'no PPT values' rule for these IFRS metrics only.
_meta.basis_note: IFRS figures here are the company's SPECIAL-PURPOSE IFRS financial statements (audited annually, prepared because the parent reports under IFRS). They are NOT mandated by the sectoral regulator (IRDAI) and are NOT the statutory IGAAP filing. Every audit row is tagged document_type=investor_presentation and carries this basis caveat in its source name.
_meta.override: no_ppt_rule overridden for IFRS cells only (Neha, 2026-06-08)
_meta.transcribed_by: claude-code session 2026-06-08; read directly from the cited deck pages with pypdfium2
_meta.coverage: Niva Bupa across its Q4FY26 / H1FY26 / Q3FY26 / Q4FY25 decks: 16/20 IFRS cells filled (all 8 PAT cells, claims/expense ratios for the cumulative periods FY/H1/9M, net worth). The 4 standalone-quarter IFRS claims/expense ratios (Q4FY25, Q4FY26) are not printed in any deck - decks show only cumulative periods - so they stay honestly empty. Star/Care/ManipalCigna/Aditya-Birla/ICICI/GoDigit IFRS cells await their decks (none staged).
